description_long: This is a robust, single-bladed axe featuring a broad, dark metallic blade with a slightly curved edge and a pointed poll opposite the blade. The blade is mounted perpendicularly to a cylindrical handle, which appears to be made of wood with dark metallic fittings at both ends. The handle is straight, with decorative bands and a pointed finial at the top, giving it a somewhat ornate appearance. The blade is thick and solid, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty chopping or splitting tasks. The overall construction looks sturdy, with the blade securely affixed to the handle using a traditional mounting style. The color palette is dominated by dark metallic tones and natural wood, with a glossy finish on the metal parts.
description: A sturdy, single-bladed axe with a broad dark blade and a straight wooden handle featuring metallic fittings and decorative details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the broad, curved blade and the straight handle with metallic end caps.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with the pointed finial visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the blade's profile and the handle's decorative features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the poll of the axe and the straight alignment of the handle, with the pointed finial at the top.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with dark metallic end caps and decorative bands, smooth surface, no visible grip texture.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad, curved blade with a sharp edge and a pointed poll on the opposite side; no beard, with a thick, solid profile.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metallic fittings securing the blade to the handle.
